tests.prompt: Use nemo-build-agent to scaffold and deploy an IT helpdesk agent.
Run the nemo-build-agent skill. Spec is at agents/support-triage.spec.md.
Invoke nemo-build-agent for the customer-faq agent we designed.
Build me an IT helpdesk agent that handles password resets, VPN issues, and software access requests.
Scaffold and deploy the support agent we just specced out.
Take the spec in agents/ and ship the agent to NeMo Platform.
Platform is up, models are listed, smoke chat worked. Now I want an agent that triages support cases and routes them to the right queue. Three categories: hardware, software, account access.
Spec is signed off. Move to deploy and run the eval pass.
Already explored and specced the agent design with the team. Want the workflow YAML and a deployment by EOD.
Let's design a system for routing customer queries across teams. I want to think through the tradeoffs first before any code.
Build me a new React component for the settings page.
Help me write a CrewAI agent from scratch on a fresh Python env.
